channel.title: Portapps
channel.description: Collection of portable apps for Windows

item.title: Discord PTB portable 1.0.1095-27
item.description:
Release of Discord PTB portable 1.0.1095-27 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the Discord PTB portable page.

item.title: Portapps 3.11.0
item.description:
• Bump github.com/rs/zerolog from 1.32.0 to 1.33.0 (#362)
  • Bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.18.0 to 0.22.0 (#364)
